$schema_note: First-class validation anchors per Briefing §17 + §11. Highest weight in the truth hierarchy. When agent output diverges from these, the agent (or its config) is wrong, not the validation. Grows as deals close.
source: Briefing §11 + Bible v3 §9.2 + Refined Bible §11 (walked deal note)
